calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of Extraordinary Fees
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for and with David Perry and Alfredo Casuso (Co-Executors).

Mr. Melbostad addressed the issue of whether the gift to AIDS Charities is a demonstrative gift or a specific gift, spoke of the Decedent's intent, stated that the Mother's property in Pennsylvania was sold, that the $35,000.00 in the Bank of America account was used to pay administrative expenses and addressed the issue of fees. Mr. Perry spoke of his relationship with the Decedent. The accounting petition was taken under submission as of December 20, 2013 for Counsel to submit further supporting briefs.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To Dec-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Feb-04-2013 Continued To Feb-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1712-1716 Steiner St. & 1718-1722 Steiner St.)
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad and Alan Herzfeld for David Perry and Alfredo Casuso (Co-Executors).

The sale was confirmed at $2,688,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 16, 2012 as corrected in the declaration filed December 13, 2012. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. The proceeds of the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for February 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad and Alan Herzfeld for Petitioners.

Mr. Herzfeld presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary with limited authority (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from sale of any the properties are to be deposited into a blocked account.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Continued To Mar-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
